name: playflow
description: PlayFlow — sistema de overlays para transmisión de béisbol en vivo

scripts.db:backup: docker exec playflow-db mysqldump -uroot -proot_password playflow_db > infra/playflow_backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M).sql && echo '✅ Backup guardado en infra/'
scripts.db:restore: docker exec -i playflow-db mysql -uroot -proot_password playflow_db < infra/playflow_backup_$(ls -t infra/playflow_backup_*.sql 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs basename) && echo '✅ Restore completado'
scripts.docker:restart: docker compose down && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:reset: pnpm db:backup && docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && echo '⚠️  Volumen destruido. Restaura con: pnpm db:restore'
